T2-FM-01: compare the familiar and novel contexts explicitly
name the abstract feature that survives the surface change
practice transfer in one moderately changed context before a fully novel one
T2-FM-02: explicit generalization statement required before transfer
compare multiple examples to derive the shared learning principle
reflection prompts target principle rather than procedure wording
T2-FM-03: reduce novelty level while preserving orchestration demand
externalize the plan across planning retention and revision steps
verify each orchestration component separately before recombining
